title: Custom Durability
description: Configure every durability in the game. Even durabilities from mods.
body:
This mod lets you configure the durability of every item in the game.

# Features
You can configure how much durability an item should have or if it should be unbreakable, in which case its durability will be disabled.

Currently you can configure the following items:
- ![tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370ce9d80e756007ed964229539e3cde87807ad8.png) Every tool individually
- ![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ddfed617b270ca80a650f728d3eff76f6772c1.png) Every armor piece individually
- ![trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c98364ccb7afabf1cbe83da599e6802357c26ec.png) Trident
- ![mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f0d49375555eb9f82d18b013c772ca35681ac2.png) Mace
- ![bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03de7c3c552768ed92cd74f21e1d178e351faea0.png) Bow
- ![crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7eb4fad79e5bb33768046a1fc963a49986bbd13.png) Crossbow
- ![shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acbd3f94c4fa2e470c93f2ecdb3511625de9f8a0.png) Shield
- ![fishing_rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e0e9a4f5a037095817055a64b4a16b029db60a5.png) Fishing Rod
- ![flint_and_steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/171dfb90326cd02fcc2c21b28d0ee283a9793cfc.png) Flint and Steel
- ![shears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9bf2b3f3ec09da814ae73927ed3ba383e71ed8.png) Shears
- ![brush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0aea84f898b4bdee7dd37ddf89c48d50eb79fbe.png) Brush
- ![elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee7677cbe39380242f45f45c67b01ab1e748389a.png) Elytra
- ![wolf_armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb312ba10aeb2cd4d436846a44ace48d9a2d113.png) Wolf Armor

### Mod Items
<details>
<summary>Currently this mod supports these other mods and their items</summary>

- [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/project/CFX9ftUJ)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/project/R2OftAxM)
- [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/project/jSV9w0J5)
- [Late Game Plus](https://modrinth.com/project/V7Se8tsd)
- [More Delight](https://modrinth.com/project/znHQQtuU)
- [Netherite Extras](https://modrinth.com/project/WRs6iRSw)
- [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/project/ge1sOdFH)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/project/LOpKHB2A)

</details>

If you want a mod to be added to this list please tell me on my discord or on github.

# Dependencies
This mod requires the following other mods as dependencies:

### Fabric
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

Although it is not required, [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is highly recommended.

# Support
If you have questions, encounter problems, find bugs or have suggestions you can join my discord server:

[![Fneifnox's Mods Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d0cb3b474c0517d6d0e11b8f77c2276edf08f.png)](https://discord.gg/bszSDCq5ms)
